setup.welcome.title: Welcome to CloudianOS
setup.welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your system before getting started.
setup.language.title: Choose your language
setup.language.subtitle: Select the language you want to use in CloudianOS.
setup.country.title: Select your country or region
setup.country.subtitle: This helps configure regional settings automatically.
setup.timezone.title: Choose your time zone
setup.timezone.subtitle: Your date and time settings will be configured automatically.
setup.keyboard.title: Keyboard layout
setup.keyboard.subtitle: Select the keyboard layout you want to use.
setup.network.title: Connect to a network
setup.network.subtitle: Choose a network connection to continue setup.
setup.account.title: Create your account
setup.account.subtitle: Set up your username and password.
setup.personalization.title: Personalization
setup.personalization.subtitle: Customize the appearance of your system.
setup.privacy.title: Privacy settings
setup.privacy.subtitle: Choose how CloudianOS handles your data.
setup.features.title: Additional features
setup.features.subtitle: Enable optional CloudianOS features.
setup.updates.title: System updates
setup.updates.subtitle: CloudianOS is checking for the latest updates.
setup.install.title: Preparing your desktop
setup.install.subtitle: This may take a few moments.
setup.finish.title: Setup complete
setup.finish.subtitle: CloudianOS is ready to use.
setup.errors.network: Unable to connect to the network.
